%% defn subeff
\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{pure}  \leq  \ottkw{pure} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{pure}  \leq  \ottkw{impure} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{impure}  \leq  \ottkw{impure} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_impure\_impure}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsubeff}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \epsilon  \leq  \epsilon' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn arith_type
\newcommand{\ottdruleATXXadd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Add}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{]}  \to  \ottkw{int}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{AT\_add}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleATXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Sub}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{]}  \to  \ottkw{int}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{AT\_sub}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleATXXmul}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Mul}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{]}  \to  \ottkw{int}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{AT\_mul}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleATXXdiv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Div}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{]}  \to  \ottkw{int}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{AT\_div}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnarithXXtype}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleATXXadd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleATXXsub{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleATXXmul{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleATXXdiv{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn state_type
\newcommand{\ottdruleSTXXnew}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{New}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{ST\_new}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSTXXdel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Del}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \to  \ottsym{[}  \,  \ottsym{]}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{ST\_del}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSTXXget}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Get}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \to  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{ST\_get}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSTXXset}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Set}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \to  \ottsym{[}  \,  \ottsym{]}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{ST\_set}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnstateXXtype}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{g}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottnt{B}  \to  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSTXXnew{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSTXXdel{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSTXXget{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSTXXset{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{lit}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{int}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \in  \Gamma }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{[}  \epsilon  \ottsym{]}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack  \quad  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{f}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXstate}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{g}  \lbrack  \ottnt{A}  \rbrack \mathord{:}  \ottnt{B}  \to  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack  \quad  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{pure}  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{g}  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_state}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXstate{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn check
\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon'  \rbrack  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack  \quad .. \quad  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{]}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{]}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{]}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon'  \rbrack  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Gamma'  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{let} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_lettuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXinject}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \in  \ottnt{B}  \quad  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_inject}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon'  \rbrack  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack  \quad .. \quad  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{->}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{->}  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXiter}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon'  \rbrack  \quad  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{Next}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{Done}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{\}}  \; \lbrack  \ottkw{impure}  \rbrack  \quad  \ottkw{impure}  \leq  \epsilon }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_iter}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon'  \rbrack  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon }%
}{
 \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \; \lbrack  \epsilon  \rbrack $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXinject{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXiter{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJtype}{
\ottdefnsubeff{}\ottdefnarithXXtype{}\ottdefnstateXXtype{}\ottdefnsynth{}\ottdefncheck{}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnss}{
\ottdefnsJtype
}

\newcommand{\ottall}{\ottmetavars\\[0pt]
\ottgrammar\\[5.0mm]
\ottdefnss}
